questions.content: The architects who designed the London Eye originally drew it for a {{BLANK}} in 1993. Subsequently, they formed a partnership with {{BLANK}} to develop the project. As the biggest observation wheel ever built its construction involved 1700 people in five countries. On average 350 hours a week are spent on maintenance of the Eye and only {{BLANK}} is used to clean the glass.
